view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly demonstrates that the system automatically creates a unique Zoom meeting room and generates a link, which is included in the confirmation email. This directly supports the requirement for automatic link generation at booking confirmation, confirming that the functionality is implemented as expected. The detailed scenario outlines the entire process, ensuring that the requirement is fully covered.
